channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: Show projects, not certificates
item.description: Portfolio that lands remote jobs: show trade-offs, not polish. Reduce API latency 85% with Redis 7.2 and cut AWS costs 40% — the real metrics recruiters care about.

item.title: Signal your remote worth in 3 steps
item.description: Negotiate remote pay: 3 signals to send first — learn the exact email templates, cost sheet, and screencast script that turned a $45k contract into $95k in six months.

item.title: Mistake in DB pool sizing
item.description: Save $1,400/month on database connections by ditching the CPU-cores rule and using latency-based sizing instead — with real benchmarks from Node.js 20, PostgreSQL 15, and Aurora 3.01.

item.title: Build an internal dev platform for $100/month
item.description: Save $3k/month building an internal developer platform on $100/month — EKS, MemoryDB, Argo CD, and a Go 1.21 CLI that tunnels localhost to staging reliably on 3G networks

item.title: Ship real users, land remote jobs
item.description: Portfolio won’t land remote jobs in 2026 — proof of impact will. 3 Nairobi-built systems that got interviews: fish bot, school fee collector, fintech ledger. Case studies, metrics, and the exact stack to use.

item.title: Pool size = CPU cores: why
item.description: Teams copy-paste this setting from a 2018 blog post, redeploy, and wonder why their API latency doubles at 9 AM while AWS bills spike by 200%.

item.title: RAG in prod: why tutorials lie
item.description: Cut RAG pipeline latency 74% and costs 68% with hybrid search and caching — what the tutorials skip about network jitter, cold starts, and duplicate queries.

item.title: Avoid 12% pay cut from FX fees
item.description: Cut 6–12% off remote pay loss — USD clauses, Wise spreads, and the hidden fees most developers miss in 2026

item.title: 3 AI skills that boost 2026 salaries
item.description: Salary jumps in 2026 go to engineers who master RAG with pgvector or Milvus at scale — not fine-tuning. Benchmarks, costs, and the exact skills that moved the needle.

item.title: Pick the Real-Time Transport That Won’t Bite
item.description: Cut API latency 80% with the right real-time transport in 2026 — WebSocket, SSE, or long-poll benchmarks and cost data on Node 20 and Redis 7.2.

item.title: Benchmark PostgreSQL vs MySQL in 2026
item.description: Cut 35 % latency and 21 % costs by choosing PostgreSQL 16.4 over MySQL 8.4 — real benchmarks, failover tests, and the one tuning knob that matters in 2026.

item.title: Land 50% higher remote pay without leaving home
item.description: Land remote jobs paying 40–50% above local rates with a data-driven packet built in 30 minutes — includes tax burdens, FX rates, and Levels.fyi 2026 ranges

item.title: Portfolio projects: ship, don't polish
item.description: Cut remote job screen time 60%: ship a live system recruiters can deploy and break in 10 minutes — Fly.io, FastAPI, Go, and chaos endpoints that prove you won’t wake them at 2 AM.

item.title: RAG pipelines: why your 90ms latency hides a disaster
item.description: Cut RAG p99 latency to 310ms and AWS bill 54% with Redis bloom filters, compact vectors, and a circuit breaker — mistakes we made and the numbers behind the fix.

item.title: Skills that move the salary needle in 2026
item.description: Discover which AI skills actually boost your 2026 salary — prompt engineering vs RAG pipeline design with real benchmark data, cost breakdowns, and salary ranges.

item.title: Pick the realtime tool in 2026
item.description: Cut realtime latency 60% with the right protocol — WebSocket vs SSE vs long polling benchmarks, nginx 1.25.4, Redis 7.2, and the exact config files you need

item.title: Wrong pool size? Slower app
item.description: The database response time was 420 ms on average.

item.title: Skip zero-trust noise: 3 rules for small teams
item.description: Cut security noise for small teams: skip service mesh and mTLS unless regulated. Focus on secrets, short-lived tokens, and network isolation to reduce real risk fast.

item.title: Negotiate remote pay from low-cost lands
item.description: Use Numbeo 2026 data to cut remote salary gaps by 28% with exact multipliers and markdown tables that recruiters actually read. Stop guessing — run the script and negotiate today.

item.title: RAG prod: 3 costs no tutorial warns
item.description: Cut RAG pipeline costs 40% and latency 22% — the real traps tutorials never mention: cache stampede, Vietnamese tokenization, and Redis vs Qdrant trade-offs
